svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="e4I05yjCUD8svOvC1qkr" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-451" dy="-151" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Scaled Dot-Product Attention & Multi-Head Attention" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="700" x="100" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sdpa_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="Scaled Dot-Product Attention" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="280" x="80" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q_in" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Q
(Query)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="70" x="80" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="k_in" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="K
(Key)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="70" x="180" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v_in" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;" value="V
(Value)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="70" x="280" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="matmul_qk" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="MatMul
(Q · Kᵀ)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="120" x="105" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="scale" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Scale ÷ √dk" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="105" y="315" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mask" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;dashed=1;" value="Mask (optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="255" y="315" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="softmax" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Softmax
(Attention Weights)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="120" x="105" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="matmul_v" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="MatMul
(Weights · V)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="120" x="105" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sdpa_out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Attention Output" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="105" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="formula" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=1;fontStyle=2;fontSize=11;" value="Attention(Q, K, V) = softmax(QKᵀ / √dk) · V" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="330" x="55" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se1" edge="1" parent="1" source="q_in" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="matmul_qk"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se2" edge="1" parent="1" source="k_in" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="matmul_qk"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se3" edge="1" parent="1" source="matmul_qk" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="scale"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se4" edge="1" parent="1" source="scale" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="softmax"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se4b" edge="1" parent="1" source="mask" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;" target="softmax"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se5" edge="1" parent="1" source="softmax" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="matmul_v"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se5b" edge="1" parent="1" source="v_in" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="matmul_v"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se6" edge="1" parent="1" source="matmul_v" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="sdpa_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="Multi-Head Attention" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="280" x="500" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_q" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Q" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="50" x="500" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_k" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="K" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="50" x="620" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_v" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;" value="V" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="50" x="740" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_proj1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Linear
Projections
(Head 1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="85" x="490" y="415" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_proj2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Linear
Projections
(Head 2)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="85" x="600" y="415" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_proj_n" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="...
(Head h)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="85" x="710" y="415" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_attn1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Attention
Head 1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="85" x="490" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_attn2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Attention
Head 2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="85" x="600" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_attn_n" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Attention
Head h" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="85" x="710" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_concat" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;" value="Concat (head1, head2, ... headh)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="310" x="490" y="265" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_linear" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" value="Final Linear Projection (W^O)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="310" x="490" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Multi-Head Attention Output" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="310" x="490" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mha_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=1;fontStyle=2;fontSize=10;" value="MHA(Q,K,V) = Concat(head1,...,headh) · W^O
where headi = Attention(QWiQ, KWiK, VWiV)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="310" x="490" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me1" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_proj1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me2" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_k" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_proj2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me3" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_v" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_proj_n"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me4" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_proj1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_attn1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me5" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_proj2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_attn2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me6" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_proj_n" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_attn_n"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me7" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_attn1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_concat"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me8" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_attn2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_concat"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me9" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_attn_n" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_concat"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me10" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_concat" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_linear"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="me11" edge="1" parent="1" source="mha_linear" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="mha_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
MHA(Q,K,V) = Concat(head1,...,headh) · W^O
where headi = Attention(QWiQ, KWiK, VWiV)
